<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 840 594" width="840" height="594">
  <style>

    .table-text { font-size: 5pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
    .body-text { font-size: 6pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; }
  </style>
  
  <!-- LEFT PANEL: Survey Plan Drawing Area -->

    <line x1="204.3934914789736" y1="20" x2="204.3934914789736" y2="570" /><line x1="221.51479318317922" y1="20" x2="221.51479318317922" y2="570" /><line x1="238.63609488738481" y1="20" x2="238.63609488738481" y2="570" /><line x1="255.75739659158882" y1="20" x2="255.75739659158882" y2="570" /><line x1="272.8786982957944" y1="20" x2="272.8786982957944" y2="570" /><line x1="290" y1="20" x2="290" y2="570" /><line x1="307.1213017042056" y1="20" x2="307.1213017042056" y2="570" /><line x1="324.2426034084112" y1="20" x2="324.2426034084112" y2="570" /><line x1="341.3639051126152" y1="20" x2="341.3639051126152" y2="570" /><line x1="358.4852068168208" y1="20" x2="358.4852068168208" y2="570" /><line x1="375.6065085210264" y1="20" x2="375.6065085210264" y2="570" /><line x1="20" y1="502.5999999999872" x2="560" y2="502.5999999999872" /><line x1="20" y1="461.48" x2="560" y2="461.48" /><line x1="20" y1="420.35999999998717" x2="560" y2="420.35999999998717" /><line x1="20" y1="379.2399999999744" x2="560" y2="379.2399999999744" /><line x1="20" y1="338.11999999998716" x2="560" y2="338.11999999998716" /><line x1="20" y1="297" x2="560" y2="297" /><line x1="20" y1="255.8799999999872" x2="560" y2="255.8799999999872" /><line x1="20" y1="214.75999999997438" x2="560" y2="214.75999999997438" /><line x1="20" y1="173.6399999999872" x2="560" y2="173.6399999999872" /><line x1="20" y1="132.52" x2="560" y2="132.52" /><line x1="20" y1="91.39999999998719" x2="560" y2="91.39999999998719" />

  <!-- Beacon Symbols -->
  <g transform="translate(333.98294082384376, 502.5999999999872)"><g><rect x="-2.8" y="-2.8" width="5.6" height="5.6" fill="black" /><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="0.84" fill="white" /><title>Concrete Beacon â SET</title><desc>Kenya Survey Regulations 1994, Reg 17(d)</desc></g></g><g transform="translate(204.3934914789736, 489.1480517256023)"><g><rect x="-2.8" y="-2.8" width="5.6" height="5.6" fill="black" /><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="0.84" fill="white" /><title>Concrete Beacon â SET</title><desc>Kenya Survey Regulations 1994, Reg 17(d)</desc></g></g><g transform="translate(241.351134709256, 133.39332020207968)"><g><rect x="-2.8" y="-2.8" width="5.6" height="5.6" fill="black" /><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="0.84" fill="white" /><title>Concrete Beacon â SET</title><desc>Kenya Survey Regulations 1994, Reg 17(d)</desc></g></g><g transform="translate(375.6065085210264, 91.39999999998719)"><g><rect x="-2.8" y="-2.8" width="5.6" height="5.6" fill="black" /><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="0.84" fill="white" /><title>Concrete Beacon â SET</title><desc>Kenya Survey Regulations 1994, Reg 17(d)</desc></g></g>
  
  <!-- Point Labels -->
  <text x="337.98294082384376" y="498.5999999999872" font-size="3">AB1</text><text x="208.3934914789736" y="485.1480517256023" font-size="3">AB2</text><text x="245.351134709256" y="129.39332020207968" font-size="3">AB3</text><text x="379.6065085210264" y="87.39999999998719" font-size="3">AB4</text>
  
  <!-- North Arrow -->
  <g transform="translate(540, 40)">
    <line x1="0" y1="15" x2="0" y2="-15" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <polygon points="0,-15 -3,0 3,0" fill="black"/>
    <text x="0" y="22" font-size="4" text-anchor="middle">N</text>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Scale Bar -->
  <g transform="translate(240, 569)">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="100" y2="0" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>

  <!-- RIGHT PANEL: Information -->
  <rect x="580" y="0" width="260" height="594" fill="#FAFAFA" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  
  <!-- SECTION A: Title Block -->
  <text x="590" y="20" class="title">DEED PLAN</text>
  <text x="590" y="35" class="body-text">Survey No: RS087_2026_014_R00</text>
  <text x="590" y="47" class="body-text">Drawing No: FR-583-83-SUBDIV-A</text>
  <text x="590" y="59" class="body-text">Scale: 1 : 1000</text>
  <text x="590" y="71" class="body-text">Date: 2026-05-04</text>
  <line x1="590" y1="80" x2="830" y2="80" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  
  <!-- SECTION B: Parcel Information -->
  <text x="590" y="95" class="section-header">PARCEL INFORMATION</text>
  <text x="590" y="108" class="body-text">Parcel: A / L.R. Kajiado-Kaputiei North-18462</text>
  <text x="590" y="120" class="body-text">Reg. Section: Kaputiei North</text>
  <text x="590" y="132" class="body-text">Locality: Kitengela, Kaputiei North</text>
  <text x="590" y="144" class="body-text">County: Kajiado</text>
  <text x="590" y="156" class="body-text">Area: 16137.4273 m²</text>
  <text x="590" y="168" class="body-text">Area: 1.613743 ha</text>
  <text x="590" y="180" class="body-text">Datum: ARC1960 (Zone 37S)</text>
  <line x1="590" y1="188" x2="830" y2="188" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  
  <!-- SECTION C: Abuttals -->
  <text x="590" y="203" class="section-header">ABUTTALS</text>
  <text x="590" y="216" class="body-text">North: Remainder parcel B</text>
  <text x="590" y="228" class="body-text">South: Access road reserve</text>
  <text x="590" y="240" class="body-text">East: Neighbouring agricultural holding</text>
  <text x="590" y="252" class="body-text">West: Remainder parcel B</text>
  <line x1="590" y1="260" x2="830" y2="260" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>
  
  <!-- SECTION D: Bearing Schedule -->
  <text x="590" y="275" class="section-header">BEARING SCHEDULE</text>
  <line x1="590" y1="278" x2="830" y2="278" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.3"/>
  <text x="595" y="288" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">LEG</text>
  <text x="620" y="288" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">FROM</text>
  <text x="655" y="288" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">TO</text>
  <text x="690" y="288" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">BEARING</text>
  <text x="755" y="288" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">DIST (m)</text>
  <text x="595" y="298" class="table-text">1</text><text x="620" y="298" class="table-text">AB1</text><text x="655" y="298" class="table-text">AB2</text><text x="690" y="298" class="table-text">275Â°55'34.773"</text><text x="755" y="298" class="table-text">74.00</text><text x="595" y="306" class="table-text">2</text><text x="620" y="306" class="table-text">AB2</text><text x="655" y="306" class="table-text">AB3</text><text x="690" y="306" class="table-text">005Â°55'51.267"</text><text x="755" y="306" class="table-text">203.14</text><text x="595" y="314" class="table-text">3</text><text x="620" y="314" class="table-text">AB3</text><text x="655" y="314" class="table-text">AB4</text><text x="690" y="314" class="table-text">072Â°37'51.606"</text><text x="755" y="314" class="table-text">79.89</text><text x="595" y="322" class="table-text">4</text><text x="620" y="322" class="table-text">AB4</text><text x="655" y="322" class="table-text">AB1</text><text x="690" y="322" class="table-text">185Â°46'48.202"</text><text x="755" y="322" class="table-text">234.73</text>
  <line x1="590" y1="350" x2="830" y2="350" stroke="black" stroke-width="0.5"/>

  <text x="775" y="378" class="table-text" font-weight="bold">NORTHING</text>

  <!-- SECTION F: Surveyor's Certificate -->
  <text x="590" y="455" class="section-header">SURVEYOR'S CERTIFICATE</text>
  <text x="590" y="470" class="body-text">I hereby certify that this survey was carried out under</text>
